description: Add useOptionalI18n() hook to packages/ui/src/lib/i18n/client.tsx that returns null outside I18nProvider instead of throwing; locale falls back to LOCALE_CONFIG.defaultLocale
DatePicker.tsx renders display value with date-fns 'P' pattern and getDateFnsLocale(activeLocale) instead of hardcoded 'MM/dd/yyyy'
DatePicker accepts optional displayFormat prop as escape hatch for callers needing a fixed pattern
Audit all DatePicker call sites (37+) and confirm none rely on MM/dd/yyyy display output for parsing/serialization; document results in SCRATCHPAD
DateTimePicker.tsx renders locale-aware: explicit timeFormat prop wins ('P hh:mm a'/'P HH:mm' with locale), unset uses locale-derived 'P p'
Calendar.tsx passes date-fns locale to DayPicker so weekday/month names localize
Calendar MonthYearSelect caption format() calls use the active date-fns locale
CurrencyInput formats display value with Intl.NumberFormat(activeLocale) instead of hardcoded en-US
CurrencyInput parses input locale-aware: derive group/decimal separators via formatToParts, strip group separators, normalize decimal separator to '.' before parseFloat
PrintOptionsDialog formatDefaultPrintValue uses active locale for Date values instead of bare toLocaleString()

ReportExecutionOptions gains locale?: string in packages/reporting ReportEngine; threaded through execute → formatValue → formatCurrency/formatNumber/formatPercentage/formatDate; defaults to 'en-US' when absent
Identical locale threading applied to the server/src/lib/reports/core/ReportEngine.ts copy; duplication noted in SCRATCHPAD for future dedup
executeReport server action (both copies) resolves viewer locale via getHierarchicalLocaleAction and passes it in options
filterPseudoLocales() keeps xx/yy when process.env.NODE_ENV === 'development'; INCOMPLETE_LOCALES (pt) stays filtered in dev
packages/core dist rebuilt; all 7 language pickers show Pseudo (xx)/Pseudo (yy) in dev and hide them in production builds
Selecting xx in dev persists as user preference and renders pseudo-translated UI across MSP and client portals
Backfill cross-namespace actions.print / actions.printOptions keys in en for all 7+ affected namespaces (assets, clients, contacts, jobs, schedule, user-activities, workflows)
Backfill 131 missing en keys in msp/workflows (WorkflowRunList, WorkflowDesigner, RunStudioShell)
Backfill 111 missing en keys in msp/email-providers (InboundEmailRuleForm)
Backfill 81 missing en keys in msp/integrations (LevelIoIntegrationSettings, InboundEmailRulesManager)
Backfill 81 missing en keys in features/tickets (TicketChecklistSection, TicketingDashboard, TicketDetails)
Backfill 54 missing en keys in msp/clients (Clients.tsx, MeetingAttendeesPicker, InteractionDetails, ClientDetails, ClientContractAssignment)
Backfill 40 missing en keys in msp/assets (AssetDashboardClient)
Backfill 37 missing en keys in msp/user-activities (ActivitiesTableFilters, AdHocDetailPanel)

Backfill remaining ~120 missing en keys across msp/settings, common, msp/invoicing, msp/keyboard-shortcuts, msp/quotes, msp/contracts, projects, msp/schedule, msp/knowledge-base, features/projects, features/documents, client-portal, msp/time-entry
Translate all backfilled keys into fr, es, de, nl, it, pl, pt
Regenerate xx/yy pseudo-locales covering all backfilled keys
find-missing-i18n-keys.cjs reports 0 missing keys (exit 0)
MspClientTickets.tsx (client page Tickets tab) wired with useTranslation using msp/clients namespace; all hardcoded strings keyed
MspClientAssets.tsx (client page Assets tab) wired with useTranslation using msp/clients namespace; all hardcoded strings keyed
MspContactTickets.tsx (contact page Tickets tab) wired with useTranslation using msp/contacts namespace; all hardcoded strings keyed
InteractionsFeed.tsx (client page Interactions tab) wired with useTranslation using msp/clients interactions.* keys
OverallInteractionsFeed.tsx wired with useTranslation using msp/clients interactions.* keys
SchedulingInteractionDetails.tsx wired with useTranslation using msp/schedule namespace
All P3 component keys added to en + 7 production locales + regenerated pseudo-locales
ROUTE_NAMESPACES verified to load msp/clients on /msp/clients, msp/contacts on /msp/contacts, and msp/schedule where SchedulingInteractionDetails renders
Remaining 16 msp-composition files swept and documented in SCRATCHPAD as having no user-visible strings (providers/wrappers)

Full inventory of legacy _plural keys across all locales recorded in SCRATCHPAD (known: teams.details.memberCount_plural, interaction-types imported_plural, security.sessions.subtitle_plural x2 files)
English legacy _plural keys migrated to i18next v4 _one/_other forms in msp/settings.json and msp/profile.json
Non-English locales migrated with correct CLDR plural category sets (Polish gets _one/_few/_many/_other)
AdminSessionManagement.tsx replaces manual subtitle/subtitle_plural selection with a single t() call passing count (sessionCount drives plural; both interpolation variables preserved)
All other consumers of migrated plural keys verified to pass count and resolve correct forms (TeamDetails.tsx memberCount, interaction-types import toast)

validate-translations.cjs is CLDR-aware via Intl.PluralRules: no false warnings for locale-required plural suffixes (pl _few/_many), and flags locales missing required plural categories for keys with English plural forms
generate-pseudo-locales.cjs verified to carry plural-suffixed keys through to xx/yy correctly
validate-translations.cjs passes with 0 errors and 0 warnings across all locales
find-missing-i18n-keys job added to .github/workflows/validate-translations.yml
Workflow paths triggers expanded to packages/**, server/src/**, ee/server/src/**, and the find-missing script so component changes trigger validation
CI green on a no-op PR after P5 lands (both scripts pass from clean main)
